message:
bd-3bxhj.4.9: Unit tests for planner, mappings, generator templates, and optimization passes

Add 39 integration tests across the translation pipeline:

- Mapping Atlas (7): lookup by signature, policy/risk/category partitioning,
  coverage ratio validation, target non-emptiness
- Translation Planner (10): decision ordering, stats consistency, determinism,
  seed variation, high-threshold gap tickets, unsupported-effect gaps,
  strategy validity, empty-IR edge case
- Code Emission Templates (8): all required files emitted, model/msg/update
  content verification, Cargo.toml structure, determinism, manifest
  confidence tracking, stats consistency
- Optimization Passes (12): dead-branch elimination, if-true unwrapping,
  import deduplication, whitespace normalization, non-Rust skip, custom
  config pass selection, audit records, net-line-change, determinism,
  style-constant folding, helper extraction
- Cross-pipeline (2): end-to-end plan→emit→optimize flow, atlas↔planner
  strategy consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
